creator: semen@iclub.nsu.ru
text:
Hi!

The right way to resolve this problem is to merge changes from current.
(As current code already support this PHY)

I have no 4.1 box here, so i ask you to test the update patch, it is
attached. New version use miibus, and can be built as KLD.
(So you have to add device miibus to kernel config, or remove device tx,
and build mii and tx KLD)

Good luck.
